text:
Fixed. The changes:

- `overflow-visible` → `overflow-hidden` on the Card — badges can no longer bleed outside the card boundary
- `flex-1` → `flex-1 min-w-0` on the inner wrapper — ensures the left side (token name/symbol) properly constrains itself and doesn't push the badges out
- Added `truncate` to the symbol text so long symbols don't force layout overflow
- Added `whitespace-nowrap` to badges so they never wrap mid-word
- Removed `justify-between` and `ml-2` in favor of natural flex gap, keeping badges pinned right via `items-end`
